title: Kane Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kane Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Arunachal Pradesh

overview.short: Kane Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in West Siang district of the Indian state of Arunachal Pradesh.
overview.description: Kane Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in West Siang district of the Indian state of Arunachal Pradesh. The sanctuary covers an area of 31 km2 (12 sq mi) and was declared as a protected area in 1991. The protected area consists of a mixture of tropical evergreen and temperate broad leaf mixed forests. The fauna found in the sanctuary include Indian elephant, Bengal tiger, gaur, Asiatic black bear, slow loris, rhesus macaque, capped langur, Himalayan serow, mouse deer, and antelopes.

topPlaces.name: Likabali
topPlaces.description: Likabali, a town in the foothills, is the Headquarters of 22nd district i.e. Lower Siang district of Arunachal Pradesh state of India.

topPlaces.name: Malinithan
topPlaces.description: Malinithan is an archaeological site containing the ruins of an early medieval period temple on the northern bank of the Brahmaputra River in the Indian state of Arunachal Pradesh. It is generally attributed to the Chutia kings in the 13th-14th century.

items.note: Likabali, a town in the foothills, is the Headquarters of 22nd district i.e. Lower Siang district of Arunachal Pradesh state of India.

Malinithan is an archaeological site containing the ruins of an early medieval period temple on the northern bank of the Brahmaputra River in the Indian state of Arunachal Pradesh. It is generally attributed to the Chutia kings in the 13th-14th century.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kane Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kane Wildlife Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kane Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dibrugarh Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (216 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kane Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kane Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kane Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kane Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kane Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Likabali, Malinithan.
